subject: fix(icons): quality cleanup — meta tags, error handling, docs, SVG hygiene
body:
- Add <meta name="theme-color"> for mobile browser chrome colour
- Add sizes="180x180" to apple-touch-icon link
- Add SVG source existence check with meaningful error in generation script
- Remove redundant rx="0" ry="0" from SVG rect
- Fix inaccurate SVG comment (was "overlapping ellipses", is cubic bezier)
- Update CLAUDE.md file structure with assets/, scripts/, static/ dirs
- Add pnpm generate-icons to CLAUDE.md build commands
- Fix ARCHITECTURE.md: static/ was incorrectly nested under src/

Tags: icons, meta, docs, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: app-icons
Semver: patch
